title: Duzzit Foam Fresh Toilet Cleaner, Citrus Zest
features: SELF ACTIVATING FOAM: Duzzit Fragranced Foaming Toilet Cleaner, works to keep your toilet sparkling clean and fresh, helping to remove limescale. Recommended to use daily. Simpy add to toilet bowl water, leave the foam to self clean the toilet bowl
NEUTRALISE ODOURS: Duzzit Fragranced Foaming Toilet Cleaner, a specially formulated powder, activated by water. Cleans, neutralises odours, removes limescale

CLEAN & FRESH: Duzzit Fragranced Foaming Toilet Cleaner, use daily or include in your regular en-suite and bathroom weekly clean to aid the removal of limescale and stains to leave toilets sparkling clean with a Citrus Fresh fragrance

DEEP CLEANS: For best results use Duzzit Fragranced Foaming Toilet Cleaner daily. Shake one dose directly into the toilet bowl water. The powder will foam, cleaning the toilet bowl and releasing the fragrance. Flush away for a sparkling clean toilet. For added limescale prevention, leave overnight, flush then use. To use against a stronger smell add more powder for additional cleaning power. Use only as a toilet bowl cleaner.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Duzzit Foam Fresh Toilet Cleaner, 370g, Citrus Fresh Scent
description: Product Description Duzzit Fragranced Foaming Toilet Cleaner, works to keep your toilet sparkling clean and fresh, helping to remove limescale. Recommended to use daily. Simpy add to toilet bowl water, leave the foam to self clean the toilet bowl. Duzzit Fragranced Foaming Toilet Cleaner, use daily or include in your regular en-suite and bathroom weekly clean to aid the removal of limescale and stains to leave toilets sparkling clean with a Citrus Fresh fragrance. For best results use Duzzit Fragranced Foaming Toilet Cleaner daily. Shake one dose directly into the toilet bowl water. The powder will foam, cleaning the toilet bowl and releasing the fragrance. Flush away for a sparkling clean toilet. For added limescale prevention, leave overnight, flush then use. To use against a stronger smell add more powder for additional cleaning power. Use only as a toilet bowl cleaner. Search Amazon.co.uk or visit the Duzzit store for a range of cleaning products. Duzzit Foam Fresh Toilet Cleaner, 370g, Citrus Fresh Scent Ingredients <5% Anionic Surfactants, Parfum, Limonene, Benzyl Salicylate.
